key_risks: Weaker-than-expected June CPI or employment data on July 2/14 could pressure risk assets
Escalation in Iran-related geopolitics may increase volatility before July 24
FOMC minutes on July 8 could shift rate expectations and affect small-cap and bank holdings

portfolio.rationale: Strong 30-day outperformance and positive EMA recommendations for medicines support near-term gains before July 24 exit.
Sector led market gains on June 26 with favorable regulatory news and defensive characteristics amid mixed macro data.
Domestic small-value exposure benefits from improving consumer sentiment and low unemployment claims over the one-month window.
Recent strength in regional banks aligns with stable rates and positive GDP revision likely to support credit conditions before exit.

portfolio_rationale: Overweight recent outperformers in healthcare/biotech and domestic small-value/banks to capture momentum supported by regulatory and macro data releases within the scoring window.
rationale_summary: Portfolio tilts to sectors with positive catalysts and recent relative strength while avoiding tech/growth areas hit by recent declines and geopolitical oil moves.
